message:
fix(hooks): properly spread rest parameters in frozen function hooks

When a JavaScript function has rest parameters (e.g., `function foo(a, ...args)`),
the hook must spread the args when calling the frozen version:
`return globalThis.__frozen_foo(a, ...args);`

Previously, it was passing args as an array instead of spreading:
`return globalThis.__frozen_foo(a, args);`

This caused functions like `getDiagnosticText(message, ...args)` to receive
incorrect arguments when redirected to their frozen implementations.
